tracked_version.description: canopyVersion read from package.json — the version the extension was last synced against

current_version.description: Current canopy version derived from git log of .claude/canopy/ (tag or short SHA)

upstream_version_available.description: True if the upstream canopy SHA (from git ls-remote) differs from the current subtree head — a newer version is available to pull

working_tree_dirty.description: True if git status --porcelain reports any modified tracked files

subtree_updated.description: Alias for upstream_version_available — kept for backwards compatibility

canopy_version.description: Alias for current_version — kept for backwards compatibility

last_update_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the last canopy subtree merge

needs_update.description: True if any extension files are out of sync with the current canopy framework

extension_changes_detected.description: True if uncommitted or recently committed extension source changes exist in src/ since the last changelog entry

file.description: Extension source file path that has changes

description.description: Human-readable summary of what changed in this file

extension_changes_summary.description: Extension-only changes detected independently of the canopy subtree update

description.description: Human-readable description of what changed and what needs updating

framework_file.description: Path to the canopy framework file that changed

extension_files.description: Extension source file paths that need updating for this change
